---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    formats: ipynb,Rmd
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: birder
    language: python
    name: birder
---

# Compact Madness

Compare compact models on multiple Birder data sets.


## Imports and Configuration

```{python}
import re
import sys
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any
from typing import Optional

import altair as alt
import polars as pl
```

```{python}
# %cd ..
```

```{python}
from birder.common import cli
from birder.conf import settings
from birder.model_registry import Task
from birder.model_registry import registry
from birder.net.base import reparameterize_available
from birder.tools.model_info import get_model_info
```

```{python}
PATTERN = "il-common"
SUMMARY_PATH = f"results/summary_{PATTERN}.csv"
BENCHMARK_PATH = f"results/benchmark_{PATTERN}.csv"
MODEL_NAME_ATTR = "architecture_id"
# MODEL_NAME_ATTR = "model_id"
```

```{python}
RESULT_FILE_RE = re.compile(
    r"^(?P<model_id>.+?)_"
    r"(?P<num_classes>\d+)"
    r"(?:_e(?P<epoch>\d+))?"
    r"_(?P<resolution>\d+)px"
    r"_crop(?P<center_crop>[0-9.]+)"
    r"_(?P<num_samples>\d+)"
    r"(?P<options>(?:_[A-Za-z0-9.]+)*)$"
)

SSL_METHODS = {
    "barlow-twins",
    "byol",
    "capi",
    "data2vec",
    "data2vec2",
    "dino-v1",
    "dino-v2",
    "dino-v2-dist",
    "dino-v3",
    "franca",
    "i-jepa",
    "ibot",
    "lejepa",
    "mmcr",
    "nepa",
    "rotnet",
    "simclr",
    "vicreg",
}

NON_SSL_TAG_PREFIXES = {
    "bioclip-v1",
    "bioclip-v2",
    "bioclip-v25",
    "biotrove-clip-o",
    "mim",
    "openai-clip",
    "pe-core",
    "siglip-v2",
    "tips-v2",
}

TAG_PREFIXES = sorted(SSL_METHODS | NON_SSL_TAG_PREFIXES, key=len, reverse=True)
```

## Helper Functions

```{python}
@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ParsedResultName:
    file_name: str
    model_id: str
    num_classes: int
    epoch: Optional[int]
    resolution: int
    center_crop: float
    num_samples: int
    options: list[str]


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class ModelMetadata:
    model_id: str
    architecture_id: str
    tag: Optional[str]
    training_method: Optional[str]
    training_tag: Optional[str]
    reparameterized: bool
    intermediate: bool
    mim: bool
    distilled: bool
    ssl: bool
```

```{python}
def _strip_result_suffix(file_name: str) -> str:
    name = Path(file_name).name
    if name.endswith(".csv.gz") is True:
        name = name.removesuffix(".csv.gz")
    else:
        name = Path(name).stem

    return name.removesuffix("_sparse")
```

```{python}
def parse_result_file_name(file_name: str) -> ParsedResultName:
    stem = _strip_result_suffix(file_name)
    match = RESULT_FILE_RE.match(stem)
    if match is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Cannot parse result file name: {file_name}")

    options = [item for item in match.group("options").split("_") if item != ""]
    epoch = match.group("epoch")

    return ParsedResultName(
        file_name=Path(file_name).name,
        model_id=match.group("model_id"),
        num_classes=int(match.group("num_classes")),
        epoch=int(epoch) if epoch is not None else None,
        resolution=int(match.group("resolution")),
        center_crop=float(match.group("center_crop")),
        num_samples=int(match.group("num_samples")),
        options=options,
    )
```

```{python}
def _find_architecture_id(model_id: str, registered_architectures: list[str]) -> str:
    for architecture_id in registered_architectures:
        if model_id == architecture_id or model_id.startswith(f"{architecture_id}_"):
            return architecture_id

    return model_id
```

```{python}
def _split_tag_prefix(tag: Optional[str]) -> tuple[Optional[str], Optional[str]]:
    if tag is None:
        return (None, None)

    for prefix in TAG_PREFIXES:
        if tag == prefix:
            return (prefix, None)
        if tag.startswith(f"{prefix}-"):
            return (prefix, tag.removeprefix(f"{prefix}-"))
        if tag.startswith(f"{prefix}_"):
            return (prefix, tag.removeprefix(f"{prefix}_"))
        if prefix == "mim" and tag.startswith(prefix) and tag[len(prefix) :].isdigit() is True:
            return (prefix, tag.removeprefix(prefix))

    return (None, tag)
```

```{python}
def infer_model_metadata(model_id: str, registered_architectures: list[str]) -> ModelMetadata:
    architecture_id = _find_architecture_id(model_id, registered_architectures)
    tag = None
    if architecture_id != model_id:
        tag = model_id.removeprefix(f"{architecture_id}_")

    training_method, training_tag = _split_tag_prefix(tag)
    tag_tokens = set(re.split(r"[_-]", tag or ""))
    reparameterized = "reparameterized" in tag_tokens
    intermediate = "intermediate" in tag_tokens
    mim = training_method == "mim" or "mim" in tag_tokens
    distilled = "dist" in tag_tokens or training_method == "dino-v2-dist"
    ssl = training_method in SSL_METHODS

    return ModelMetadata(
        model_id=model_id,
        architecture_id=architecture_id,
        tag=tag,
        training_method=training_method,
        training_tag=training_tag,
        reparameterized=reparameterized,
        intermediate=intermediate,
        mim=mim,
        distilled=distilled,
        ssl=ssl,
    )
```

```{python}
def _model_info(architecture_id: str, num_classes: int, reparameterized: bool) -> tuple[str, float]:
    model = registry.net_factory(architecture_id, num_classes=num_classes, input_channels=3)
    if reparameterized is True and reparameterize_available(model) is True:
        model.reparameterize_model()

    info = get_model_info(model)
    result = (_model_type(model), info["num_params"] / 1e6)

    return result
```

```{python}
def _model_type(model: Any) -> str:
    if "model_registry.model_registry" in model.__class__.__module__:
        return model.__class__.__bases__[0].__name__.replace("_", " ")

    return model.__class__.__name__.replace("_", " ")
```

```{python}
def _model_name(parsed_name: ParsedResultName, name_attr: str) -> str:
    model_name = getattr(parsed_name, name_attr)
    attr = []
    if parsed_name.training_method is not None:
        attr.append(parsed_name.training_method)
    if parsed_name.intermediate is True:
        attr.append("i")
    if parsed_name.distilled is True:
        attr.append("dist")
    if parsed_name.reparameterized is True:
        attr.append("r")

    if len(attr) > 0:
        attr_str = ", ".join(attr)
        model_name += f" ({attr_str})"

    return model_name.replace("_", " ")
```

## Data Loading and Processing

```{python}
compare_results_df = pl.read_csv(SUMMARY_PATH)
registered_architectures = sorted(registry.list_models(task=Task.IMAGE_CLASSIFICATION), key=len, reverse=True)

parsed_names = [parse_result_file_name(file_name) for file_name in compare_results_df["File name"]]
metadata_by_model = {
    parsed.model_id: infer_model_metadata(parsed.model_id, registered_architectures) for parsed in parsed_names
}
```

```{python}
model_type = []
num_param = []
for parsed in parsed_names:
    metadata = metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id]
    parsed_model_type, parsed_num_param = _model_info(
        metadata.architecture_id, parsed.num_classes, metadata.reparameterized
    )
    model_type.append(parsed_model_type)
    num_param.append(parsed_num_param)
```

```{python}
compare_results_df = compare_results_df.with_columns(
    pl.Series(
        "Model name", [_model_name(metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id], MODEL_NAME_ATTR) for parsed in parsed_names]
    ),
    pl.Series("Model id", [parsed.model_id for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Architecture id", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].architecture_id for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Tag", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].tag for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Training method", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].training_method for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Training tag", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].training_tag for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Num classes", [parsed.num_classes for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Epoch", [parsed.epoch for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Resolution", [parsed.resolution for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Center crop", [parsed.center_crop for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Prediction samples", [parsed.num_samples for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Prediction options", [",".join(parsed.options) for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Model type", model_type),
    pl.Series("Parameters (M)", num_param),
    pl.Series("Reparameterized", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].reparameterized for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Intermediate", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].intermediate for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("MIM", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].mim for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Distilled", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].distilled for parsed in parsed_names]),
    pl.Series("Self-supervised learning", [metadata_by_model[parsed.model_id].ssl for parsed in parsed_names]),
)
```

### Join Benchmark Data

```{python}
benchmark_df = pl.read_csv(BENCHMARK_PATH)
benchmark_df = benchmark_df.with_columns(
    pl.col("samples_per_sec").cast(pl.Float64, strict=False),
    pl.col("peak_memory").cast(pl.Float64, strict=False),
)
compare_results_df = compare_results_df.join(
    benchmark_df, left_on=["Model id", "Resolution"], right_on=["model_name", "size"], how="left"
)
compare_results_df = compare_results_df.with_columns((1000 * (1 / pl.col("samples_per_sec"))).alias("ms / sample"))
```

```{python}
compare_results_df = compare_results_df.rename(
    {"samples_per_sec": "Samples / sec", "peak_memory": "Peak GPU memory (MB)"}
)
```

### Save Processed Output

```{python}
compare_results_df.write_csv(settings.RESULTS_DIR.joinpath(f"results_{PATTERN}.csv"))
```

## Visualize Results

```{python}
def plot_acc_param(param_compare_results_df: pl.DataFrame, width: int = 900, height: int = 640) -> alt.LayerChart:
    df = param_compare_results_df.select(
        "Model name",
        "Model type",
        "Accuracy",
        "Top-3 accuracy",
        "Resolution",
        "Parameters (M)",
        "Pareto frontier (p)",
        "Intermediate",
        "MIM",
        "Distilled",
    )
    base = df.plot.point(
        x="Parameters (M)",
        y="Accuracy",
        color="Model type",
        shape="Resolution:N",
        tooltip=[
            "Parameters (M)",
            "Accuracy",
            "Top-3 accuracy",
            "Model name",
            "Model type",
            "Resolution",
            "Intermediate",
            "MIM",
            "Distilled",
        ],
    )
    text = base.mark_text(align="center", baseline="middle", dy=-10).encode(text="Model name")
    frontier = df.plot.line(x="Parameters (M)", y="Pareto frontier (p)").mark_line(
        interpolate="step-after", color="red", strokeWidth=0.3, strokeDash=(2, 2)
    )

    chart = base + text + frontier
    return chart.properties(title="Accuray vs Parameter Count", width=width, height=height).configure_scale(zero=False)
```

```{python}
def plot_acc_memory(memory_compare_results_df: pl.DataFrame, width: int = 900, height: int = 640) -> alt.LayerChart:
    batch_size = memory_compare_results_df["max_batch_size"][0]
    amp = memory_compare_results_df["amp"][0]
    df = memory_compare_results_df.select(
        "Model name",
        "Model type",
        "Accuracy",
        "Top-3 accuracy",
        "Resolution",
        "Peak GPU memory (MB)",
        "Parameters (M)",
        "Pareto frontier (mem)",
        "Intermediate",
        "MIM",
        "Distilled",
    )
    base = df.plot.point(
        x="Peak GPU memory (MB)",
        y="Accuracy",
        color="Model type",
        shape="Resolution:N",
        tooltip=[
            "Peak GPU memory (MB)",
            "Parameters (M)",
            "Accuracy",
            "Top-3 accuracy",
            "Model name",
            "Model type",
            "Resolution",
            "Intermediate",
            "MIM",
            "Distilled",
        ],
    )
    text = base.mark_text(align="center", baseline="middle", dy=-10).encode(text="Model name")
    frontier = df.plot.line(x="Peak GPU memory (MB)", y="Pareto frontier (mem)").mark_line(
        interpolate="step-after", color="red", strokeWidth=0.3, strokeDash=(2, 2)
    )

    chart = base + text + frontier
    return chart.properties(
        title=f"Accuray vs GPU Memory (batch size={batch_size}, amp={amp})", width=width, height=height
    ).configure_scale(zero=False)
```

```{python}
def plot_acc_rate(rate_compare_results_df: pl.DataFrame, width: int = 900, height: int = 640) -> alt.LayerChart:
    device = rate_compare_results_df["device"][0]
    compiled = rate_compare_results_df["compile"][0]
    batch_size = rate_compare_results_df["max_batch_size"][0]
    amp = rate_compare_results_df["amp"][0]
    df = rate_compare_results_df.select(
        "Model name",
        "Model type",
        "Accuracy",
        "Top-3 accuracy",
        "Resolution",
        "ms / sample",
        "Parameters (M)",
        "Pareto frontier (ms)",
        "Intermediate",
        "MIM",
        "Distilled",
    )
    base = df.plot.point(
        x="ms / sample",
        y="Accuracy",
        color="Model type",
        shape="Resolution:N",
        tooltip=[
            "ms / sample",
            "Parameters (M)",
            "Accuracy",
            "Top-3 accuracy",
            "Model name",
            "Model type",
            "Resolution",
            "Intermediate",
            "MIM",
            "Distilled",
        ],
    )
    text = base.mark_text(align="center", baseline="middle", dy=-10).encode(text="Model name")
    frontier = df.plot.line(x="ms / sample", y="Pareto frontier (ms)").mark_line(
        interpolate="step-after", color="red", strokeWidth=0.3, strokeDash=(2, 2)
    )

    chart = base + text + frontier
    return chart.properties(
        title=f"Accuray vs {device.upper()} Rate (compile={compiled}, batch size={batch_size}, amp={amp})",
        width=width,
        height=height,
    ).configure_scale(zero=False)
```

```{python}
# Parameter count
param_compare_results_df = compare_results_df.unique(subset=["Model name", "Resolution"]).sort(
    "Parameters (M)", descending=False
)
param_compare_results_df = param_compare_results_df.with_columns(
    pl.col("Accuracy").cum_max().alias("Pareto frontier (p)")
)
param_compare_results_df = param_compare_results_df.drop("Samples / sec", "device", "ms / sample")
chart = plot_acc_param(param_compare_results_df)
# chart.layer[0].encoding.x.scale = alt.Scale(domain=[0.5, 7.5])
x_max = param_compare_results_df["Parameters (M)"].quantile(0.9)
x_min = param_compare_results_df["Parameters (M)"].quantile(0.1)
chart.layer[0].encoding.x.scale = alt.Scale(domain=[x_min, x_max])
chart.show()
```

```{python}
# Memory usage
memory_compare_results_df = compare_results_df.drop_nulls(subset=["Peak GPU memory (MB)"])
memory_compare_results_df = memory_compare_results_df.unique(subset=["Model name", "Resolution"]).sort(
    "Peak GPU memory (MB)", descending=False
)
memory_compare_results_df = memory_compare_results_df.with_columns(
    pl.col("Accuracy").cum_max().alias("Pareto frontier (mem)")
)
memory_compare_results_df = memory_compare_results_df.drop("Samples / sec", "device", "ms / sample")
chart = plot_acc_memory(memory_compare_results_df)
x_max = memory_compare_results_df["Peak GPU memory (MB)"].quantile(0.9)
x_min = memory_compare_results_df["Peak GPU memory (MB)"].quantile(0.1)
chart.layer[0].encoding.x.scale = alt.Scale(domain=[x_min, x_max])
chart.show()
```

```{python}
combination_df = (
    compare_results_df.drop_nulls(subset=["ms / sample"])
    .select("device", "max_batch_size", "compile", "amp", "single_thread")
    .unique()
)
combination_df = combination_df.drop_nulls()
for combination in combination_df.iter_rows(named=True):
    df = compare_results_df.filter(**combination)

    # Device rate
    device_compare_results_df = df.unique(subset=["Model name", "Resolution"]).sort("ms / sample", descending=False)
    device_compare_results_df = device_compare_results_df.with_columns(
        pl.col("Accuracy").cum_max().alias("Pareto frontier (ms)")
    )
    chart = plot_acc_rate(device_compare_results_df)
    # chart.show()

    x_max = device_compare_results_df["ms / sample"].quantile(0.95) * 1.04
    x_min = device_compare_results_df["ms / sample"].min() * 0.96
    chart.layer[0].encoding.x.scale = alt.Scale(domain=[x_min, x_max])
    chart.show()
```
